title: H2O2 content measurement
author: Mingxin Guo

steps_raw.instruction: The seedlings were cultured in Kimura’s culture solution B until six-leaf stage.
200 mg of fresh leaf tissue subjected to alkaline treatment of pH 9.5 for 0, 3, 5 days was extracted in 2.0 ml of TCA (0.1% w/v) on ice.
The homogenate was then centrifuged at 12,000 rpm for 10 min.
add 0.3 mL of 10 mM sodium phosphate buffer (pH 7.5).
add 0.6 mL of 1 M potassium iodide to 0.3 mL of the above supernatant.
the absorbance of the samples was measured at 390 nm.
H2O2 content, expressed as nmol g-1 fresh weight, was determined based on the standard curve generated from known concentrations of H2O2.
